title: Wano Prepares While the World Shakes
description: On pages 15–18, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Toki, Unknown person #15, Queen, Unknown person #16 as The raid preparations accelerate while outside Wano, Reverie news shakes the world.
scene: The raid preparations accelerate while outside Wano, Reverie news shakes the world.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Yay!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Was the abolishing of the Shichibukai system!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Those plunderers have been pushing their luck for a while!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: They would have been a huge help

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It says that they should be captured soon!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The proposal, put forward by two kings whose kingdoms had suffered greatly at the hands of the Shichibukai, sparked heated debate.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But, at the end, it was passed by a super- majority.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Thus!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You of the Shichibukai have been stripped of all the rights you have heretofore enjoyed!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: New World Karai Bari Island

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Any and all ties between you and the world government have been severed!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's a dirty move! No consulta- lion, nothing? Completely one-sided?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've served our purpose, so it's time to round us all up?! I thought you idiots were the honorable ones!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Chairman Buggy! The coastline's completely surrounded!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's not our fault crocodile and Doflamingo pulled a fast one on you dolts!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why do we have to catch the fallout?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: This totally derails my life plan!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: What should we do?! run?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We give 'em hell, that's what we do!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: RRAAA ARRGGGHA! That's our Chairman buggy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Show me what yer made of, boys!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: RAA AAAGG GGHH!

dialogue.speaker: Toki
dialogue.text: And I'll scamper off in the meantime!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Kuraigana Island ruins of the Shikkearu Kingdom

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: surren- Der at once,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Hawkeye me milkawk!

dialogue.speaker: Queen
dialogue.text: Ah, this excitement... it's been too long.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Too long since I've been chased. Fufu.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: New World A Certain Island

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: What do we do, Mommy?! Mommy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Lookie!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: We don't always know

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I thought the Marines were our friends! But they've surrounded us!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Looks like they're not our friends anymore!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: How Unforgiv- Able!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Weevil! You can get 'em!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Really?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Then I'm gonna kill 'em all!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: NYO- Gashima Amazon Lily

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: snake princess! This is bad!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: They've taken away our Shichibukai powers!

dialogue.speaker: Kozuki Alliance
dialogue.text: My lady, there are marine ships approaching!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Remember someone

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: do not fret. It seems they have forgotten.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: The reason we became ShichiBukai

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: is because we are strong.

summary: This section advances the Wano - Before the Raid and World News storyline with 46 dialogue beats. The raid preparations accelerate while outside Wano, Reverie news shakes the world.
